- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. (created file)

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements (user provided full MERN requirements)

- [x] Scaffold the Project (manual MERN layout: backend + frontend, Vite + Express)

- [x] Customize the Project (algorithms, APIs, React UI, Mongo history fallback)

- [x] Install Required Extensions (none required from setup info)

- [x] Compile the Project (npm install backend/frontend; frontend build passed)

- [x] Create and Run Task (not needed; use npm scripts directly)

- [ ] Launch the Project

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete (README added; instructions cleaned)

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
